name: Pumpkin Roll
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the eggs on high for 5 minutes.
2. Gradually add sugar and stir in pumpkin and lemon juice.
3. Mix dry ingredients and fold in gently.
4. Pour batter into a greased cookie sheet with 1-inch sides (spread evenly).
5. Sprinkle pecans over the top.
6. Bake at 375°F for 15 minutes.
7. Cool slightly, then turn out onto a powdered sugar towel.
8. Sprinkle additional powdered sugar on top and gently smooth it.
9. Roll up in the towel; cool completely.
10. Unroll and spread filling evenly over the roll.
11. Re-roll and refrigerate or freeze (wrap in foil).
